product: Alibaba Cloud Qwen3.5 122B A10B now available as a Databricks-hosted model in…
tagline: Model Serving now supports Alibaba Cloud Qwen3.5 122B A10B as a Databricks hosted model.
what_it_does: Model Serving now supports Alibaba Cloud Qwen3.5 122B A10B as a Databricks hosted model. You can access this model using Foundation Model APIs. Qwen3.5 122B A10B is available in Public Preview.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Model Serving now supports Alibaba Cloud Qwen3.5 122B A10B as a Databricks hosted model. You can access this model using Foundation Model APIs.
key_takeaway: Model Serving now supports Alibaba Cloud Qwen3.5 122B A10B as a Databricks hosted model.
